skill.name: executing-plans
skill.description: Execute implementation plans in batches with review checkpoints for architect approval
skill.summary: Structured plan execution with batch processing and built-in review gates
skill.author: ZhanlinCui

content.user_title: Execute Implementation Plans with Review Checkpoints
content.value_statement: Transforms written plans into structured execution with built-in review points. Ensures quality through batch processing and architect feedback loops.
actual_capabilities: Load and critically review implementation plans before execution
Execute tasks in configurable batches with progress tracking
Report progress between batches for architect review
Integrate with finishing-a-development-branch skill for completion
Stop and request clarification when encountering blockers
Track task progress using TodoWrite for visibility
limitations: Requires a pre-written implementation plan to function
Cannot generate or create implementation plans independently
Requires human review between batches for approval workflow
Depends on external finishing-a-development-branch skill for completion

use_cases.title: Large Feature Implementation
use_cases.description: Execute multi-step feature development with architect oversight at each stage

use_cases.title: Codebase Refactoring
use_cases.description: Systematic refactoring with review checkpoints to prevent regressions

use_cases.title: Migration Projects
use_cases.description: Execute database or platform migrations with validation at each batch

prompt_templates.title: Basic Plan Execution
prompt_templates.prompt: I have an implementation plan ready. Please use the executing-plans skill to execute it in batches. Load the plan from [PLAN_FILE], review it for any concerns, then execute the first batch of tasks.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting execution of a pre-approved implementation plan

prompt_templates.title: Batch Size Configuration
prompt_templates.prompt: Execute this plan with batches of [N] tasks at a time. After each batch, report progress and wait for my approval before continuing to the next batch.
prompt_templates.scenario: Customizing batch size for specific project needs

prompt_templates.title: Plan Review with Concerns
prompt_templates.prompt: Before executing this plan, please review it critically and identify any potential issues, gaps, or concerns. Raise any problems before starting execution.
prompt_templates.scenario: Ensuring plan quality before execution begins

prompt_templates.title: Blocked Task Handling
prompt_templates.prompt: If you encounter any blockers during execution, stop immediately and report the issue with details about what is blocking progress. Do not attempt to work around blockers without approval.

output_examples.input: Execute the implementation plan from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
output_examples.output: I'm using the executing-plans skill to implement this plan. I've reviewed the plan and have no concerns. Starting execution of batch 1 (tasks 1-3): [Task 1 completed with verification], [Task 2 completed with verification], [Task 3 completed with verification]. Batch 1 complete. Ready for feedback.

output_examples.input: Continue with the next batch after approval
output_examples.output: Executing batch 2 (tasks 4-6). All tasks completed successfully with verifications passing. Implementation summary: [list of changes]. Ready for feedback.

best_practices: Always review the plan critically before starting execution to catch gaps early
Stop immediately when encountering blockers rather than guessing solutions
Provide clear progress reports after each batch with verification output
anti_patterns: Skipping verification steps specified in the plan
Continuing past blockers without raising them for review
Executing all tasks without intermediate review checkpoints

faq.question: What happens if I don't have an implementation plan yet?
faq.answer: This skill requires a pre-written plan. Use a planning skill first to create the implementation plan, then return to execute it.

faq.question: Can I change the batch size?
faq.answer: Yes, the default is 3 tasks per batch, but you can specify any batch size that suits your review cadence.

faq.question: What if the plan has errors during execution?
faq.answer: Stop immediately and report the issue. The skill is designed to halt on blockers rather than proceed with potentially incorrect assumptions.

faq.question: How do I complete the entire development after all batches?
faq.answer: After the final batch, the skill automatically uses the finishing-a-development-branch skill to complete testing, verification, and deployment options.

faq.question: Can this skill modify the implementation plan during execution?
faq.answer: No, but if fundamental issues arise, execution stops and returns to the review phase where the plan can be updated before continuing.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is designed to work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code AI assistants for consistent plan execution workflows.
